import { operate } from '../util/lift'; import { createOperatorSubscriber } from './OperatorSubscriber'; import { innerFrom } from '../observable/innerFrom'; import { noop } from '../util/noop'; export function skipUntil(notifier) { return operate(function (source, subscriber) { var taking = false; var skipSubscriber = createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, function () { skipSubscriber === null || skipSubscriber === void 0 ? void 0 : skipSubscriber.unsubscribe(); taking = true; }, noop); innerFrom(notifier).subscribe(skipSubscriber); source.subscribe(createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, function (value) { return taking && subscriber.next(value); })); }); } //# sourceMappingURL=skipUntil.js.map
